properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a table that You've prepared for me In the presence of my enemies It's Your body and Your blood You shed for me This is how I fight my battles

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is how I fight my battles

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I believe You've overcome And I will lift my song of praise for what You've done

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is how I fight my battles This is how I fight my battles This is how I fight my battles This is how

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In the valley I know that you're with me Surely Your goodness and your mercy follows me My weapons are praise and thanksgiving This is how I fight my battles

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It may look like I'm surrounded but I'm surrounded by You
